nodes.recentposition: Benefits Communications and Fair Coordination Intern at VMware in Palo Alto, CA
nodes.involvements: HRMA at UCI, AMP (2018-2020), International Student Ambassador (2019)
nodes.bios: Hello hello! My name is Jocelyn and I initiated in the fall quarter of my freshman year. In my free time, I enjoy watching (and re-watching) cooking and dance videos, doing Blogilates, and exploring new views and eats. Fun fact, I used to have a pink streak in my hair! Ask me why I think leggings are superior to jeans or about my travel bucket list at recruitment – looking forward to meeting you!
